title: epilobium hirsutum var. intermedium
intro: Epilobium hirsutum var. intermedium, also known as Intermediate Willowherb, is a variety of Epilobium hirsutum, a flowering plant that belongs to the willowherb family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Epilobium hirsutum var. intermedium can be used as a natural remedy for various health conditions, such as urinary tract infections and benign prostatic hyperplasia, and may also help to improve prostate health. In addition, the plant has been traditionally used to treat various other health issues, including fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions.
